# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [readyup-v0.13.0] - 2026-04-08

### Features

- Rdy|feat: Add readyup package and repo tooling

Readyup (`rdy`) is a pre-deployment verification CLI. Define checklists in TypeScript kits, run them locally or from a remote source, and get structured pass/fail reporting with remediation hints.

Includes repo-level tooling: esbuild-based build system, Vitest test suite, ESLint + Prettier, Lefthook pre-commit hooks, and nmr script runner.
